category_sources: Official tfcmt documentation describes posting Terraform execution results as pull request comments.
source_facts.description says tfcmt notifies Terraform command execution results.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and repository use the display name tfcmt.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub Pages documentation site for tfcmt.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official tfcmt documentation covers Terraform plan/apply result comments in pull request workflows.
source_facts.description identifies Terraform command result notifications.
